# IntelliForm (v0.9)
> Agentic AI Green Chemistry Formulation Platform

IntelliForm is an industrial-strength agentic platform for designing sustainable chemical formulations. It bridges the gap between natural language intent and pilot-ready manufacturing by integrating cheminformatics, multi-objective optimization, and regulatory intelligence.

## System Capabilities
- **Agentic Swarm:** Orchestrates NL parsing, optimization, and QSAR modeling into a single "Software-to-Steel" pipeline.
- **Cheminformatics Engine:** Powered by RDKit for SMILES validation and molecular descriptor enrichment.
- **Optimization Suite:** - **PuLP LP Solver:** For cost-basis ingredient blending.
    - **NSGA-III Pareto Optimizer:** Multi-objective optimization across performance, cost, and EcoMetrics™.
- **Predictive ML (QSAR/QSPR):** XGBoost-based property prediction using Mordred descriptors and PubChemPy enrichment.
- **Regulatory Intelligence:** Real-time screening against REACH, EPA Safer Choice, COSMOS, and EU Ecolabel.

## Technical Stack
- **Interface:** Streamlit (Dark Theme) with specialized tabs for ROI, Pareto Frontiers, and Model Cards.
- **Backend:** Python 3.11 with Conda/RDKit environment.
- **Data & Persistence:** Supabase (PostgreSQL) for project history and active learning feedback loops.
- **Analytics:** PostHog integration for usage funnel analysis.

## Core Pillars
- **Green Chemistry:** Focuses on bio-based ingredients and carbon footprint reduction (EcoMetrics™).
- **Safe-by-Design:** Automated regulatory flagging at the concept stage.
- **Manufacturing Ready:** Outputs calibrated for ChemRich NJ pilot batching.

## Repository Structure
- `/modules`: Core engines (QSAR, Pareto, Regulatory, EcoMetrics).
- `/data`: Curated bio-based ingredient database (SMILES validated).
- `/migrations`: Supabase SQL schemas for persistent project memory.
- `agents.py`: LLM agent swarm orchestration logic.
